TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kalaw == u bacu nu kalaw atu tabaki sa, caay kalecad ku nu tademaw. izaw ku tademaw misanga' saca mikulit tu bacu nu kalaw. sakamu sa, kawanan atu kawili a kalaw pulung izaw ku cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu a banuh. mahiza tu banuh nu kidu izuma, haymaw tanaya'. maka tulu katukuh sepat a bulad mahetik tuway, miliyaw langaw macelak. sisa, apuyu' tu ku kalaw. nika, izay sikalaw ku tademaw saw? nahemin miundu kami, sitanan kami i zais, tina tanan malesusu' tayza i mata nu mita. uyzasa, zayhan kami si kalaw, kya tanan mikilu tu kalaw, malesusu' tatebal nu mata. caay katalabu nu mata. anu takelal ku cilal saan, makulebut ku kalaw kita, patalahekal ku kalaw. mahiza ku zuku nu mata, taneng mitena' tu cilal a edil. miading ku mata, caay nipacemcem tu mata. sisa, u kalaw nu mita, izaw tu ku sasahicaan mitena' tu tanan atu cilal, palawacu' tu mata niyam. u sasahicaan nu kalaw sa, mitena' ku nanum tayza i mata. u lilis nu kalaw taneng patudu' ku nanum tayza i tabal nu bihid. taneng mitena' ku adidi'ay a bunak, patena' macumud tu mata. anu matawa muwanic kita, miedap tu mizateng ku musakamuay. u kamu nu Hulam The eyebrow is an area of thick, delicate hairs above the eye that follows the shape of the lower margin of the brow ridges of some mammals. Their main function is to prevent sweat, water, and other debris from falling down into the eye socket, but they are also important to human communication and facial expression. It is not uncommon for people to modify their eyebrows by means of hair addition, removal and makeup. According to the 2016 United States census, roughly 3% of the population suffers from a disease called madarosis, which is a deficiency where individuals cannot grow eyebrows or eyelashes.
S.PHON: == kar~…ĺaw == u ba ¶u nu kar~…ĺaw atu tabaki sa, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nu tad…ômaw. izaw ku tad…ômaw misaŇča Ē~ ° sa ¶a mikur~…ĺit tu ba ¶u nu kar~…ĺaw. sakamu sa, kawanan atu kawir~…ĺi a kar~…ĺaw pur~…ĺuŇč izaw ku ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu a banuńß. mańßiza tu banuńß nu kidu izuma, ńßajmaw tanaja Ē~ °. maka tur~…ĺu katukuńß s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad mańß…ôtik tuwaj, mir~…ĺijaw r~…ĺaŇčaw ma ¶…ôr~…ĺak. sisa, apuju Ē~ ° tu ku kar~…ĺaw. nika, izaj sikar~…ĺaw ku tad…ômaw saw? nańß…ômin miundu kami, sitanan kami i zais, tina tanan mar~…ĺ…ôsusu Ē~ ° tajza i mata nu mita. ujzasa, zajńßan kami si kar~…ĺaw, kja tanan mikir~…ĺu tu kar~…ĺaw, mar~…ĺ…ôsusu Ē~ ° tat…ôbar~…ĺ nu mata. ¶aaj katar~…ĺabu nu mata. anu tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ saan, makur~…ĺ…ôbut ku kar~…ĺaw kita, patar~…ĺańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku kar~…ĺaw. mańßiza ku zuku nu mata, tan…ôŇč mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ a …ôdir~…ĺ. miadiŇč ku mata, ¶aaj nipa ¶…ôm ¶…ôm tu mata. sisa, u kar~…ĺaw nu mita, izaw tu ku sasańßi ¶aan mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu tanan atu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, par~…ĺawa ¶u Ē~ ° tu mata nijam. u sasańßi ¶aan nu kar~…ĺaw sa, mit…ôna Ē~ ° ku nanum tajza i mata. u r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu kar~…ĺaw tan…ôŇč patudu Ē~ ° ku nanum tajza i tabar~…ĺ nu bińßid. tan…ôŇč mit…ôna Ē~ ° ku adidi Ē~ °aj a bunak, pat…ôna Ē~ ° ma ¶umud tu mata. anu matawa muwani ¶ kita, mi…ôdap tu mizat…ôŇč ku musakamuaj. u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam tńß…ô …ô…ôbrow is an ar…ôa of tńßi ¶k, d…ôr~…ĺi ¶at…ô ńßairs abo*…ô tńß…ô …ô…ô tńßat for~…ĺr~…ĺows tńß…ô sńßap…ô of tńß…ô r~…ĺow…ôr margin of tńß…ô brow ridg…ôs of som…ô mammar~…ĺs. tńß…ôir main fun ¶tion is to pr…ô*…ônt sw…ôat, wat…ôr, and otńß…ôr d…ôbris from far~…ĺr~…ĺiŇč down into tńß…ô …ô…ô so ¶k…ôt, but tńß…ô ar…ô ar~…ĺso important to ńßuman ¶ommuni ¶ation and fa ¶iar~…ĺ …ô*pr…ôssion. it is not un ¶ommon for p…ôopr~…ĺ…ô to modifj tńß…ôir …ô…ôbrows bj m…ôans of ńßair addition, r…ômo*ar~…ĺ and mak…ôup. a ¶ ¶ordiŇč to tńß…ô **** unit…ôd stat…ôs ¶…ônsus, rougńßr~…ĺj *% of tńß…ô popur~…ĺation suff…ôrs from a dis…ôas…ô ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd madarosis, wńßi ¶ńß is a d…ôfi ¶i…ôn ¶j wńß…ôr…ô indi*iduar~…ĺs ¶annot grow …ô…ôbrows or …ô…ôr~…ĺasńß…ôs.
S.FORM: == kalaw == u bacu nu kalaw atu tabaki sa, caay kalecad ku nu tademaw. izaw ku tademaw misanga' saca mikulit tu bacu nu kalaw. sakamu sa, kawanan atu kawili a kalaw pulung izaw ku cacay a malebut tulu a lasubu a banuh. mahiza tu banuh nu kidu izuma, haymaw tanaya'. maka tulu katukuh sepat a bulad mahetik tuway, miliyaw langaw macelak. sisa, apuyu' tu ku kalaw. nika, izay sikalaw ku tademaw saw? nahemin miundu kami, sitanan kami i zais, tina tanan malesusu' tayza i mata nu mita. uyzasa, zayhan kami si kalaw, kya tanan mikilu tu kalaw, malesusu' tatebal nu mata. caay katalabu nu mata. anu takelal ku cilal saan, makulebut ku kalaw kita, patalahekal ku kalaw. mahiza ku zuku nu mata, taneng mitena' tu cilal a edil. miading ku mata, caay nipacemcem tu mata. sisa, u kalaw nu mita, izaw tu ku sasahicaan mitena' tu tanan atu cilal, palawacu' tu mata niyam. u sasahicaan nu kalaw sa, mitena' ku nanum tayza i mata. u lilis nu kalaw taneng patudu' ku nanum tayza i tabal nu bihid. taneng mitena' ku adidi'ay a bunak, patena' macumud tu mata. anu matawa muwanic kita, miedap tu mizateng ku musakamuay. u kamu nu Hulam The eyebrow is an area of thick, delicate hairs above the eye that follows the shape of the lower margin of the brow ridges of some mammals. Their main function is to prevent sweat, water, and other debris from falling down into the eye socket, but they are also important to human communication and facial expression. It is not uncommon for people to modify their eyebrows by means of hair addition, removal and makeup. According to the 2016 United States census, roughly 3% of the population suffers from a disease called madarosis, which is a deficiency where individuals cannot grow eyebrows or eyelashes.
S.PHON: == kar~…ĺaw == u ba ¶u nu kar~…ĺaw atu tabaki sa, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nu tad…ômaw. izaw ku tad…ômaw misaŇča Ē~ ° sa ¶a mikur~…ĺit tu ba ¶u nu kar~…ĺaw. sakamu sa, kawanan atu kawir~…ĺi a kar~…ĺaw pur~…ĺuŇč izaw ku ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu a banuńß. mańßiza tu banuńß nu kidu izuma, ńßajmaw tanaja Ē~ °. maka tur~…ĺu katukuńß s…ôpat a bur~…ĺad mańß…ôtik tuwaj, mir~…ĺijaw r~…ĺaŇčaw ma ¶…ôr~…ĺak. sisa, apuju Ē~ ° tu ku kar~…ĺaw. nika, izaj sikar~…ĺaw ku tad…ômaw saw? nańß…ômin miundu kami, sitanan kami i zais, tina tanan mar~…ĺ…ôsusu Ē~ ° tajza i mata nu mita. ujzasa, zajńßan kami si kar~…ĺaw, kja tanan mikir~…ĺu tu kar~…ĺaw, mar~…ĺ…ôsusu Ē~ ° tat…ôbar~…ĺ nu mata. ¶aaj katar~…ĺabu nu mata. anu tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ ku ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ saan, makur~…ĺ…ôbut ku kar~…ĺaw kita, patar~…ĺańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku kar~…ĺaw. mańßiza ku zuku nu mata, tan…ôŇč mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ a …ôdir~…ĺ. miadiŇč ku mata, ¶aaj nipa ¶…ôm ¶…ôm tu mata. sisa, u kar~…ĺaw nu mita, izaw tu ku sasańßi ¶aan mit…ôna Ē~ ° tu tanan atu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ, par~…ĺawa ¶u Ē~ ° tu mata nijam. u sasańßi ¶aan nu kar~…ĺaw sa, mit…ôna Ē~ ° ku nanum tajza i mata. u r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu kar~…ĺaw tan…ôŇč patudu Ē~ ° ku nanum tajza i tabar~…ĺ nu bińßid. tan…ôŇč mit…ôna Ē~ ° ku adidi Ē~ °aj a bunak, pat…ôna Ē~ ° ma ¶umud tu mata. anu matawa muwani ¶ kita, mi…ôdap tu mizat…ôŇč ku musakamuaj. u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam tńß…ô …ô…ôbrow is an ar…ôa of tńßi ¶k, d…ôr~…ĺi ¶at…ô ńßairs abo*…ô tńß…ô …ô…ô tńßat for~…ĺr~…ĺows tńß…ô sńßap…ô of tńß…ô r~…ĺow…ôr margin of tńß…ô brow ridg…ôs of som…ô mammar~…ĺs. tńß…ôir main fun ¶tion is to pr…ô*…ônt sw…ôat, wat…ôr, and otńß…ôr d…ôbris from far~…ĺr~…ĺiŇč down into tńß…ô …ô…ô so ¶k…ôt, but tńß…ô ar…ô ar~…ĺso important to ńßuman ¶ommuni ¶ation and fa ¶iar~…ĺ …ô*pr…ôssion. it is not un ¶ommon for p…ôopr~…ĺ…ô to modifj tńß…ôir …ô…ôbrows bj m…ôans of ńßair addition, r…ômo*ar~…ĺ and mak…ôup. a ¶ ¶ordiŇč to tńß…ô **** unit…ôd stat…ôs ¶…ônsus, rougńßr~…ĺj *% of tńß…ô popur~…ĺation suff…ôrs from a dis…ôas…ô ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd madarosis, wńßi ¶ńß is a d…ôfi ¶i…ôn ¶j wńß…ôr…ô indi*iduar~…ĺs ¶annot grow …ô…ôbrows or …ô…ôr~…ĺasńß…ôs.
